hooks.command: [ -f flowctl-state.json ] && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('flowctl-state.json')); s=d.get('current_step',0); name=d.get('steps',{}).get(str(s),{}).get('name','') if s else ''; agent=d.get('steps',{}).get(str(s),{}).get('agent','') if s else ''; status=d.get('overall_status','not_started'); blockers=len([b for b in d.get('steps',{}).get(str(s),{}).get('blockers',[]) if not b.get('resolved')]); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': f'[Workflow] {d.get(\"project_name\",\"Chưa khởi tạo\")} | {status} | Step {s}: {name} | @{agent} | Blockers: {blockers} | Use wf_state() not cat | Monitor: bash scripts/flowctl.sh monitor'}))" 2>/dev/null || true
